auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue streaming your favorites
auth.registerSubtitle: Join ReelTime Media and start streaming today
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.agreeToTermsError: Please agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

home.promoTitle: The most diverse movie library at
home.promoDesc: Enjoy a huge selection of movies and series. Buy movies one time from $0.99 to $3.99, or subscribe to series for only $3/month or $15/year.
home.joinMillions: Join millions of viewers and get unlimited access to thousands of movies and series.
home.noContentDesc: Add movies and series in Supabase with status "published" to see them here.

browse.title: Browse
browse.subtitle: Discover your next favorite movie or series
browse.tryDifferent: Try a different title or check the spelling

movies.title: Movies
movies.subtitle: Single-part movies. Pay per title to buy or rent.

series.title: Series
series.subtitle: Subscribe monthly to stream all episodes.

search.title: Search
search.placeholder: Search by title, actor, or genre...
search.startTyping: Start typing to search for movies & dramas
search.noContentFound: No content found for "{query}". Try a different search term.

pricing.title: Choose how you watch
pricing.subtitle: Single movies: pay per title. Series: unlock everything with a monthly subscription.
pricing.disclaimer: Prices may vary by title. Subscription grants access to series content only; movies are sold separately.
pricing.fallbackDesc: Monthly access to all series. Binge every episode, cancel anytime.
pricing.noPlans: No subscription plans are available right now.
pricing.noPlansHint: Plans are managed in your database. You can still explore series and movies.

profile.noPurchasesDesc: Movies you buy are yours forever — find one you love and own it for life.
profile.noActiveSubscriptionDesc: Subscribe to unlock all series and watch without limits.

watch.signInToWatch: Sign in to watch for free
watch.freeEpisodeDesc: Episode {ep} is free — just sign in to your account to start watching.
watch.moviePayDesc: You need to complete a one-time payment to watch this movie any time.
watch.episodeFreeRange: Episodes 1–{count} are free. Episode {ep} requires a subscription.
watch.subscribeDesc: Get a subscription to unlock all episodes and keep watching without limits.
watch.paidAccessNote: Once paid, you'll be able to watch {item} any time from your account.
watch.noVideoSupport: Your browser does not support the video tag.
watch.noDescription: No description available for this title yet.
watch.handpickedForYou: Handpicked based on what you're watching
watch.sessionFailed: We could not start playback. Your session may have expired.
watch.metadataNotFoundDesc: This title is unavailable or was removed.
watch.qualitySingleRendition: Only one quality is available for this stream.
watch.qualityNativeHint: This browser picks quality automatically. For manual quality, try Chrome or Edge on desktop when HLS adaptive streaming is used.
watch.qualityProgressiveHint: This title uses a single video file, so quality cannot be changed.

payment.pleaseWait: Please wait while we confirm your payment.
payment.thankYou: Thank you for your purchase. Your payment has been confirmed.
payment.accessLinked: Access is linked to your account
payment.notCompleted: Your payment was not completed. You have not been charged.
payment.noCharges: No charges have been made to your account
payment.recordSaved: Your payment record has been saved for reference

checkout.title: Complete Your Purchase
checkout.subtitle: Secure payment via Cambodian banks (ABA, ACLEDA, Sathapana, Wing)
checkout.redirectHint: You will be redirected to our secure payment page where you can choose from:
checkout.supportsNote: Supports KHQR, Mobile Banking Deeplinks, and Card payments (via ABA)
checkout.signInDesc: You need an account to purchase and keep access to this content.
checkout.secureNote: Secure payment processed by licensed Cambodian banks
checkout.step1: Click Pay to go to the secure payment page
checkout.step2: Select your preferred bank or payment method
checkout.step3: Scan QR code or complete payment in your banking app
checkout.step4: Get instant access to your content
checkout.needSignIn: You need to sign in before making a payment.

footer.tagline: Your premium destination for movies and dramas. Stream the latest blockbusters and timeless classics in stunning quality, anytime, anywhere.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
